page.heading: Skills
page.deleteConfirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

empty.title: No skills yet
empty.body: Create a blank skill, import one from a file, or browse the community catalog.

selectPrompt.title: Select a skill
selectPrompt.body: Pick a skill on the left to preview its body.

editor.name: Name
editor.bodyHint: Injected into the reviewing agent's prompt as review guidance.
editor.untrustedNotice: Imported from an untrusted source — its body is wrapped as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before you enable it for an agent.
editor.previewHint: Rendered as the reviewing agent receives it.
editor.previewEmpty: Add a body in the Config tab to preview it.

drawer.title: Add a skill
drawer.subtitle: Import from a file or search vetted community skills

file.nameHint: Optional — derived from the first heading if blank.
file.bodyHint: Pasted content is wrapped as untrusted data — never executed as instructions.

url.label: Skill URL
url.hint: Fetched server-side, stored as untrusted, and left disabled until vetted.
url.success: Imported "{name}". Disabled until you vet + enable it.

community.selectPrompt: Select a skill to preview its body.

preview.untrustedNotice: This skill came from an untrusted source. Its body is stored as data (delimiter-wrapped) and must be vetted before it is enabled for an agent.
preview.bodyHint: Saving a changed body creates a new immutable version.
